intro: Over the past two weeks, ZCyberNews has tracked 33 ransomware articles, with The Gentlemen, Kyber, and Payouts King emerging as the top threat actors. Two critical vulnerabilities, CVE-2026-1731 (CVSS 9.8) and CVE-2026-34197 (CVSS 8.8), were widely exploited across multiple sectors, including manufacturing, healthcare, logistics, and retail. The incidents primarily affected Europe, the United States, North America, and Turkey, with 27 high-severity and two critical reports logged between April 12 and April 25, 2026.
